name: set-skin
description: How to change a Minecraft account's skin, cape, and model. Use when the user wants to set/change skin, cape, or player model ("换皮肤","设置皮肤","披风","改模型").
body:
# Set account skin

`account(action=set_skin, username?, source, skinPath?, capePath?, cslApi?, model?)`

Offline accounts accept any source: `local` (a `.png` path via `skinPath`),
`little_skin`/`csl_api` (a skin-station URL via `cslApi`), or presets
`steve`/`alex`/`default`. `capePath` (a cape) is offline-only.

Online accounts (Microsoft/authlib-injector) accept ONLY `local` PNG upload — this
changes the REAL account skin, needs network + valid credentials. No cape, no
presets for online accounts.

`model` is `auto` (detect wide/slim from PNG), `wide`, or `slim`.

Call `account(action=list)` first to confirm the exact target username and whether
it's offline or online — that decides which source/params are valid.

Don't: offer cape or presets to an online account; guess the username when multiple
accounts exist without confirming which one.
